event: View of Wolverhampton Market and Church
description: A watercolor townscape depicting a bustling market scene in an English town. In the background, a large Gothic church tower with crenellations rises above the rooftops of timber-framed and stone buildings. Market stalls and figures populate the foreground, with goods displayed on tables and in baskets. The architecture shows a mix of medieval and later structures, with narrow lanes converging toward the central church. A warm, hazy light suffuses the scene under a pale sky.
